queries: E2E pipeline Integrating APIs for Data Ingestion 2023
action.query: E2E pipeline Integrating APIs for Data Ingestion 2023

annotations.title: How to build API-driven data pipelines on AWS to unlock third-party data | AWS Public Sector Blog
Automated Data Ingestion from APIs · Pipelines · Dataloop
End-to-end development lifecycle for data engineers to build a data integration pipeline using AWS Glue | AWS Big Data Blog
Automating API delivery with CI/CD pipelines | Google Cloud Blog
Integration of E2E Testing in a CI/CD Pipeline | Keploy Blog
Data Pipeline Quality: Influencing Factors, Root Causes of Data-related Issues, and Processing Problem Areas for Developers

content.text:
Integrating APIs for data ingestion within end-to-end (E2E) pipelines is crucial for efficient data processing and analysis. Here are several authoritative and recent sources that provide insights into this topic:

1. **"How to Build API-Driven Data Pipelines on AWS to Unlock Third-Party Data"**  
   This AWS Public Sector Blog post discusses developing API data pipelines using AWS services like Lambda, Glue, and Step Functions to extract data from third-party SaaS tools. It offers practical guidance on orchestrating data ingestion from various sources. ([aws.amazon.com](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/publicsector/how-to-build-api-driven-data-pipelines-on-aws-to-unlock-third-party-data/?utm_source=openai))

2. **"Automated Data Ingestion from APIs"**  
   Dataloop's article explains how to set up data pipelines that automatically collect and clean data from multiple APIs. It emphasizes the importance of seamless data collection and provides a step-by-step guide to building such pipelines. ([dataloop.ai](https://dataloop.ai/library/pipeline/automated_data_ingestion_from_apis/?utm_source=openai))

3. **"End-to-End Development Lifecycle for Data Engineers to Build a Data Integration Pipeline Using AWS Glue"**  
   This AWS Big Data Blog post outlines the development lifecycle for creating data integration pipelines with AWS Glue. It covers aspects like local development, provisioning components, and building CI/CD pipelines for data integration. ([aws.amazon.com](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/big-data/end-to-end-development-lifecycle-for-data-engineers-to-build-a-data-integration-pipeline-using-aws-glue/?utm_source=openai))

4. **"Building an E2E Data Infrastructure"**  
   ZapSight's article details the architecture of a modern data infrastructure that integrates various operational systems into a unified analytics environment. It highlights components like the ingestion layer, which utilizes tools such as Airbyte and AWS Glue for API/database extraction. ([zapsight.com](https://zapsight.com/solutions/ai-data-engineer?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Automating API Delivery with CI/CD Pipelines"**  
   Google Cloud's blog post discusses the automation of API delivery within CI/CD pipelines, emphasizing the integration of APIs into development processes to enhance efficiency and reliability. ([cloud.google.com](https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/api-management/automating-api-delivery-with-cicd-pipelines?utm_source=openai))

6. **"Integration of E2E Testing in a CI/CD Pipeline"**  
   Keploy's blog post explores the integration of end-to-end testing within CI/CD pipelines, focusing on API testing and automation to ensure the reliability of data ingestion processes. ([keploy.io](https://keploy.io/blog/technology/integration-of-e2e-testing-in-a-cicd-pipeline?utm_source=openai))

7. **"Streamlining PySpark Data Pipelines: Integrating External Data Sources and APIs"**  
   This article provides insights into integrating external data sources and APIs into PySpark data pipelines, offering best practices and practical examples for efficient data ingestion. ([onlinescientificresearch.com](https://onlinescientificresearch.com/articles/streamlining-pyspark-data-pipelines-integrating-external-data-sources-and-apis.pdf?utm_source=openai))

8. **"Data Pipeline Quality: Influencing Factors, Root Causes of Data-related Issues, and Processing Problem Areas for Developers"**  
   This research paper examines factors affecting data pipeline quality, including data integration and ingestion tasks, and discusses common issues and best practices for developers. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.07067?utm_source=openai))

These resources provide comprehensive information on integrating APIs for data ingestion within E2E pipelines, covering various tools, best practices, and real-world applications.
